bird.name: Socotra warbler
bird.summary: The Socotra warbler (Incana incana) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is monotypic within the genus Incana.

relations.subject: Socotra warbler
relations.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Incana. It is endemic to Socotra. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Socotra warbler
relations.evidence: It is monotypic within the genus Incana. It is endemic to Socotra. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
